generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that our NATO allies are still not meeting their defense spending commitments? While we're protecting them, they're cutting corners on their own security. It's time we focus on America first and make sure our tax dollars aren't being wasted on freeloaders. #AmericaFirst #NATO #NationalSecurity
